mechanism: Both reflect the same structural condition: the front end of the curve is driven by cyclical monetary policy expectations while the long end is driven by fiscal dynamics. The kink in the yield curve and the correlation bifurcation are different manifestations of the AM/PF at cyclical frequency, PM/AF at secular frequency structure.
regime_dependence: Both present during transition zones between monetary and fiscal dominance. n=3 for kinked curve and n=2 for prior correlation bifurcation episodes, with opposite resolution directions observed.
